latin: Literaliter optimum quod umquam gustavimus. Christus omnia quae amabat 'literaliter optima' vocabat. nihil erat mediocre — omnia aut pessima aut optima erant.

questions.prompt: How does Chris describe things he likes?
What is never an option in Chris's vocabulary?

translation: Literally the best thing we have ever tasted. Chris called everything he loved 'literally the best.' Nothing was mediocre — everything was either the worst or the best.
